field_values.action_summary: With the Lion safely out of the poppies, the Queen of the Mice promises future assistance before leading her subjects away. The group settles down in the grass, waiting anxiously for the Lion to wake up.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots showing the mice departing.; Medium group shots of the exhausted but relieved travelers.; Close-up on the Lion's face to build tension for his awakening.
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Maintain lion position relative to the poppy bed edge.
Manage lighting/time of day transition from rescue to rest.
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH009_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from active rescue to a state of weary rest. The visual narrative must move from the large-scale movement of the mice exodus to an intimate, high-tension focus on the unconscious lion's face as the group waits for his awakening.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- queen_of_the_field_mice
- Thousands of Field Mice

## Required Environments
- grassy_riverbank_meadow (adjacent to poppy_bed)

## Continuity Constraints
- Maintain lion position relative to the poppy bed edge.
- Manage lighting/time of day transition from rescue to rest.

## Beat List
- BT001: Queen of the Field Mice promises assistance and leads subjects away.
- BT002: The travelers settle down in the grass.
- BT003: Anxious waiting for the Lion's awakening.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
